g.text: Match Monitor Saba Group Betting - Database Flow (Stored Procedures)
1. Get last processed SequenceID from SystemParameter
SELECT MatchID, ScoreDiff, BettypeID, BetID, Betteam, GroupID
GROUP BY MatchID, ScoreDiff, BettypeID, BetID, Betteam, GroupID
SELECT MatchID, SportType, ScoreDiff, BettypeID, BetID, Betteam,
GROUP BY MatchID, SportType, ScoreDiff, BettypeID, BetID, Betteam
SELECT DISTINCT MatchID, ScoreDiff, BettypeID, BetID, Betteam, GroupID
AND TransDateToSecond BETWEEN FromTime AND ToTime
DELETE old groups NOT in last TimeStep:
AND (MatchID, ScoreDiff, BettypeID, BetID, Betteam, GroupID)
WHILE EXISTS (transactions with GroupID = 0 before FromTime)
2. DELETE customers NOT in last TimeStep
Keep unprocessed transactions in last window
Next run starts from this SequenceID
